data.content: Implemented active-view ancestor reinclusion across the Knots, Beads, and bd CLI backends with a shared parent-chain helper. The in_action filter now keeps each active beat's ancestors visible without reintroducing descendant expansion or terminal sibling leakage. Validation: bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build; bun run lint (warnings only). Branch: feat/foolery-e805-active-ancestor. Commit: 84e47100afc2.
